findings.description: Section s5 contains a Java code example that uses the PascalCase Nablarch classes `SqlResultSet`, `SqlPStatement`, and `SystemRepository`, but none of these appear in the hints array. Per V4 rules, PascalCase class names from section content should be included as hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source Java code example: `SqlResultSet resultSet = new SimpleDbTransactionExecutor<SqlResultSet>(transactionManager) { ... public SqlResultSet execute(AppDbConnection connection) { SqlPStatement prepared = connection.prepareStatement(query); ... } }.doTransaction();` and `SimpleDbTransactionManager transactionManager = (SimpleDbTransactionManager) SystemRepository.getObject("transactionManager");`
